# Hydra Commercial License

Hydra is free and open-source software published under the
[GNU Affero General Public License v3.0](../LICENSE) (AGPL v3). The AGPL v3 requires
that any product incorporating Hydra must also be released under AGPL v3.

If you wish to use Hydra in a proprietary or closed-source product — or in any
context where you cannot comply with the AGPL v3 — a commercial license is
available from NEER AI.

---

## What the Commercial License Grants

A commercial license grants the licensee the following rights beyond what AGPL v3
permits:

- Use, integrate, and distribute Hydra within proprietary or closed-source products
  without any obligation to release the licensee's source code
- Deploy Hydra in SaaS or hosted environments without triggering AGPL v3's network
  use provisions
- Receive priority support and agree to a defined service level

These rights are granted for the term and scope specified in the executed Order Form.

---

## What the Commercial License Does Not Grant

The commercial license does not grant the licensee the right to:

- Sublicense, resell, or redistribute Hydra as a standalone product or software
  library to third parties
- Remove or obscure copyright notices or attribution requirements
- Use the NEER AI name, trademarks, or logos beyond what is required for attribution

---

## Attribution Requirement

All commercial licensees must include the following notice in a location visible to
end users of the product (e.g. an "About" screen, credits page, or equivalent):

> Powered by [Hydra](https://github.com/neeraip/hydra) — © NEER AI

The exact placement and styling may be agreed upon in the Order Form, but the notice
must be present and reasonably visible.

---

## Pricing and Terms

Commercial licenses are issued on a per-deal basis. Pricing depends on:

- Deployment scale (number of developer seats, deployments, or end users)
- License term (annual subscription or perpetual)
- Support tier

To enquire, contact: **[matthew@neer.ai](mailto:matthew@neer.ai)**

---

## Warranty and Liability

Hydra is provided "as is", without warranty of any kind, express or implied. NEER AI
shall not be liable for any damages arising from the use of the software, to the
maximum extent permitted by applicable law.

Specific warranty and indemnification terms may be negotiated and included in the
executed Order Form.

---

## Governing Law

Commercial licenses are governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, USA, without
regard to its conflict of law provisions. Any disputes shall be resolved exclusively
in the state or federal courts located in Delaware.

---

## Contributor License Agreement

Contributors to Hydra are required to sign a Contributor License Agreement (CLA)
that grants NEER AI the right to include their contributions under both the AGPL v3
and any commercial license. See [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) for
details.

---

*This document describes the commercial licensing program in general terms. It is not
itself a binding license. A binding commercial license requires a signed Order Form
between the licensee and NEER AI. Have your legal counsel review any agreement before
execution.*
